channel.title: Psychological Science Accelerator | Pablo Bernabeu

item.title: Investigating object orientation effects across 18 languages
item.description:
Study at a glance

Schematic overview; see the text for details.

graph TD A["Read sentence implying object shape and orientation"] --> B["Verify pictured object: from the sentence or not"] B --> C["Test match advantage for orientation across 18 languages, nearly 4,000 participants"] C --> D["No compelling evidence for an orientation match advantage"] C --> E["Match advantage not predicted by mental rotation scores"] D --> F["Implications for mental simulation theory and methodology"] E --> F

    General project

    Stage 1 Registered Report

    Data from our lab

Video demonstration of the procedure followed in our lab

  The value of conducting a replication study during a PhD.

Related podcasts

Created using NotebookLM, with all the benefits and blind spots of human editing.

Reference

Chen, S.-C., Buchanan, E. M., Kekecs, Z., Miller, J. K., Szabelska, A., Aczel, B., Bernabeu, P., Forscher, P. S., Szuts, A., Vally, D. Z., Al-Hoorie, A. H., Helmy, M., Silva, C. S. A. da, Silva, L. O. da, Moraes, Y. L. de, Hsu, R. M. C. S., Mafra, A. L., Valentova, J. V., Varella, M. A. C., … Chartier, C. R. (2025). Investigating object orientation effects across 18 languages. Current Psychology. https://doi.org/10.1007/s12144-025-08304-x

item.title: Multi-region investigation of ‘man’ as default in attitudes
item.description:
Study at a glance

graph TD A["Survey of over 5000 people across more than 40 regions"] --> B["Globally distributed laboratory network"] B --> C["Measure attitudes toward each group and toward its men and women"] C --> D["Stronger link with the men: Black people, politicians"] C --> E["Stronger link with the women: White people"] C --> F["No difference: East Asian people, police officers, criminals"] C --> G["Regional agreement with traditional gender roles explored as moderator"]

Schematic overview; see the text for details.

    Read the preregistration

Video demonstration of the procedure followed in our lab

Reference

Phills, C. E., Miller, J. K., Buchanan, E. M., Williams, A., Meyers, C., Brown, E. R., Zickfeld, J., Volsa, S., Stieger, S., Oberzaucher, E., Mlakic, V., Vasilev, M., Dalgar, İ., Çoksan, S., Söylemez, S., Solak, Ç., Özdoğru, A. A., Çoktok, B., Kung, C.-C., … Kekecs, Z. (2025). Multi-region investigation of ‘man’ as default in attitudes. PLOS ONE, 20(6), e0323938. https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0323938
